content: A mop is usually used after loose dirt has been swept or vacuumed from the floor. It applies water or cleaning liquid to remove stains or dust film. The exact method depends on the surface and mop design, so avoid universal cleaning claims.

title: Ladder household access role
content: A ladder helps a person reach higher places for normal household tasks, such as changing a light bulb, reaching storage, or painting a wall. Its designs vary greatly. A factual answer should describe purpose, not risky climbing or unsafe setup details.

title: Tape measure for furniture planning
content: A tape measure is useful before buying, moving, or placing furniture. It can measure room width, door clearance, table height, or cabinet depth. A beginner explanation should mention measuring length clearly and not confuse it with weighing or leveling tools.

title: Toolbox organization role
content: A toolbox helps keep tools and small repair parts in one place. It may hold screwdrivers, pliers, tape measures, fasteners, and other household items. The exact contents vary, so a chatbot should describe it as storage, not a fixed tool set.
